preamble: Monophthongization or smoothing of the diphthong 'ai' to 'æ' involves the loss of the glide, leaving a single lengthened low-mid vowel.

examples.note: Characteristic smoothing of the /ai/ diphthong into a long /æ:/ vowel.
Similar smoothing of the /ai/ diphthong into a monophthongal vowel.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
